title: Build Multi-Column Document from Markdown and CSV
description: End-to-end realistic example: builds an A4-landscape, 3-column document with a spanning title, paragraph styles, an inline anchored image, and a CSV-driven table, then exports INDD/IDML/PDF/PNG. Reads all Japanese (CJK) content from UTF-8 files and references fonts by ASCII PostScript name so the .jsx source stays ASCII-only. Adjust the absolute paths near the top before running.

title: Detect and Fix Overset Text in a Table
description: Detects overset (hidden, non-fitting) text in a table's cells via cell.overflows, then fixes it by widening the overset column(s), borrowing width from the widest column that can safely shrink. Calls doc.recompose() after each change so overflow state is accurate. Demonstrates that an overset cell's .contents returns empty and that unbreakable Latin tokens (filenames/URLs) are the usual cause in CJK-mixed tables.

title: Create Table from Price List JSON
description: Creates a formatted price list table by reading data from a JSON file and populating it into an InDesign document

title: Create Text Frame with Center Aligned Contents
description: Creates a text frame and aligns its contents to the center both horizontally and vertically

title: Export Document as PNG
description: Creates a Hello World document and exports it as a PNG file with maximum quality RGB output

title: Read All Paragraph Styles
description: Reads and lists all paragraph styles defined in the active InDesign document

title: Find Layer and Add Layer
description: Demonstrates how to find an existing layer by name or create a new layer if it doesn't exist, then assigns page items to that layer

title: Read All Font Names in Active Document
description: Reads and lists all font names that are actually used in the currently active InDesign document

title: Merge IDML Files
description: Merges multiple IDML files into a single InDesign document by combining their spreads sequentially

title: Export Document as JPG
description: Creates a Hello World document and exports it as a JPG file with maximum quality RGB output

title: Create Empty InDesign Document
description: Creates a new blank InDesign document with default settings

title: List Up IDML Files
description: Lists all IDML files in a specified directory for batch processing or inventory purposes

title: Get All Image Link Names in Active Document
description: Gathers and returns the filenames of all linked images present in the active InDesign document

title: Create New Document with Text Frame
description: Creates a new InDesign document and adds a text frame with sample content

title: Place PDF File in Document
description: Places a PDF file into the active InDesign document at a specified location

title: Fractal Ginkgo Leaf
description: Generates a fractal pattern resembling a ginkgo leaf using recursive line drawing techniques

title: Bezier Curves
description: Demonstrates how to draw Bezier curves using path points with control handles for smooth curved shapes

title: Console Logging Utility
description: Demonstrates console logging functionality with custom console.log implementation and array iteration examples

title: Read All Conditional Text Names
description: Reads and lists all conditional text condition names defined in the active document

title: Export Document as PDF
description: Creates a Hello World document and exports it as a PDF file using PDF/X-1a preset

title: Read All Character Styles
description: Reads and lists all character styles defined in the active InDesign document

title: Read All Color Names
description: Reads and lists all color names defined in the document's color swatches

title: Create Document with Multiple Pages
description: Creates an InDesign document with multiple pages, demonstrating how to add and manage multiple pages programmatically

title: Read All Font Names
description: Reads and lists all available font names installed in the InDesign application

title: Save, Read and Parse JSON
description: Demonstrates how to save, read, and parse JSON data to/from files using ExtendScript file I/O operations

title: Replace Image
description: Demonstrates how to replace an existing image in a document with another image file, useful for updating graphics

title: Get Active Document File Name
description: Retrieves and displays the filename of the currently active InDesign document

title: Get Selection Information
description: Retrieves and displays information about the currently selected objects in the active document

title: Create Rounded Text Frame
description: Creates a text frame with rounded corners by applying corner options to all four corners

title: Graphic Line
description: Draws a simple graphic line between two points with customizable stroke properties

title: Create Custom Color Swatch
description: Creates a custom color swatch in the active document's swatches panel

title: Traverse Document
description: Shows how to traverse through all pages and page items in a document to inspect or manipulate elements programmatically

title: Close All Open Documents
description: Closes all open InDesign documents without saving changes

title: Export Document as EPS
description: Creates a Hello World document and exports it as an EPS file with CMYK color space and embedded fonts

title: Get Current Working Directory
description: Returns the current working directory path of the script execution

title: Convert IDML to INDD
description: Batch converts IDML files to INDD format by opening each IDML file and saving it as an InDesign document

title: Insert Image as Inline
description: Inserts an image as an inline graphic within a text frame, allowing it to flow with the text

title: Inspect Text Object
description: Inspects and displays properties of text objects including point size, leading, fill tint, and font style

title: Check Link Metadata
description: Checks and displays metadata information for linked images and files in the document, including file paths and status

title: Save, Read and Parse Text
description: Demonstrates how to save, read, and parse text/TSV data to/from files with UTF-8 encoding

title: Create Table and Find It
description: Creates a table in a document and demonstrates how to find and manipulate table elements programmatically

title: Delete All Conditional Texts
description: Deletes all conditional text conditions from the active document, removing all condition tags

title: Fractal Triangle
description: Creates a fractal triangle pattern using recursive geometric subdivision and line drawing

title: Create Hello World with Paragraph Style
description: Creates a Hello World text and applies a custom paragraph style to format the text content

title: Place Image into Rectangle
description: Places an image into a rectangle shape with specified dimensions and position

title: Create Table
description: Creates a basic table structure in an InDesign document with specified rows and columns

title: Create Hello World with Paragraph and Character Style
description: Creates a 'Hello World' text with custom paragraph and character styles applied

title: Draw a Polygon
description: Creates a polygon shape by defining path points and connecting them to form a closed or open geometric shape

title: Insert Inline Text Frame
description: Inserts a text frame as an inline element within another text frame, allowing nested text containers

title: Place Image in Center of Page
description: Places an image file at the center position of the current page in the active document

title: Place Image with Graphic Frame
description: Creates a graphic frame and places an image into it for precise positioning and sizing control
